tissue: the brain tissues from both hypoxia-treated and untreated male and female zebrafish were isolated...
disease_state: Understanding the molecular basis of sex differences in neural response to acute hypoxic insult has profound implications for the effective prevention and treatment of ischemic stroke.
sample_source: the brain tissues from both hypoxia-treated and untreated male and female zebrafish were isolated...
age: Zebrafish aged 5–6 month were segregated on the basis of sex and used for all the experiments.
strain: Wild type strain of zebrafish was bred and raised at CSIR-IICT zebrafish facility...
